who: law firm accountants processing 5–15 legal case invoices/month
offer: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient preparation causes delays in tax filing. We automate tax deduction summaries instead of manual preparation of tax deduction summaries.
problem: Inefficient preparation of tax deduction summaries from legal case expenses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm accountants
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm accountants with demo video
Share tools in community forums for law firm accountants
try_it: Let users try manual entry of legal case expenses
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
